title: × Elytesion dakotense
taxonomy: × Elytesion dakotense is classified as a hybrid orchid. It belongs to the genus × Elytesion, which is a nothogenus created by combining the names of two parent genera. The plant is a result of crossing between Epidendrum and Encyclia, two distinct species of orchids. This hybrid orchid classification allows for the identification and distinction of the plant from its parent species. Further study and classification may be necessary to fully understand the taxonomic status of × Elytesion dakotense.
